# Milestone 5 — Synthetic Fixture

A minimal, synthetic milestone file used by the captureToMilestone integration
tests. NOT a real Signal milestone — just enough plan body to prove the holding
section is created without touching structured content.

## Goals

- Prove the `## Captured via /sig:add` holding section is created when absent.
- Prove the structured plan body stays byte-identical.

## Epics

- E1 — first synthetic epic.
- E2 — second synthetic epic.

*Created 2026-05-01.*
